ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "creation_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was created */,
  "redistricted_from" TEXT /* Original district from which this district was redistricted */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates defining the district boundaries */,
  "redistricted_year" INTEGER /* Year when the district was last redistricted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the election took place */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the election (e.g., Democratic gain, Re-elected) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Specific date of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election in which the candidate participated */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate at the time of the election */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "previous_office" TEXT /* Any previous political office held by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "party_platform" TEXT /* Brief description of the party's platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incumbents" (
  "incumbent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incumbent */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the incumbent represents */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the incumbent */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party the incumbent belongs to */,
  "first_elected" INTEGER /* Year the incumbent was first elected */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Number of years the incumbent has been in office */,
  "re-election_status" INTEGER /* Whether the incumbent is running for re-election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incumbent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incumbents_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incumbents_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "winner_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning party */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the winning candidate */,
  "margin_of_victory" REAL /* Margin by which the winner won the election */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who came in second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winner_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the voter belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the voter participated in */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Whether the voter voted in the election */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters eligible to vote */,
  "voted_voters" INTEGER /* Number of voters who voted */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "voter_registration_rate" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who are registered */,
  "previous_election_turnout" REAL /* Turnout percentage in the previous election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
